original_text:
Highlights and goals of South Korea 2-1 Czech Republic in the 2026 FIFA World Cup | 06/11/2026
Highlights and goals of South Korea 2-1 Czech Republic in the 2026 FIFA World Cup
The Czech Republic struck first, but South Korea showed resilience to complete a 2-1 comeback win in Guadalajara. The result boosts the Koreans' hopes in Group A. Up next, South Korea meets Mexico, while the Czech Republic faces South Africa.
